composio_raw.name: ClickUp
composio_raw.description: ClickUp unifies tasks, docs, goals, and chat in a single platform, allowing teams to plan, organize, and collaborate across projects with customizable workflows

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive cloud-based project management and productivity platform for task tracking, document collaboration, and workflow automation.
llm_raw.notes: Composio integration data supports the OAuth2 authentication scheme; official documentation confirms explicit support for MCP.
